name: screenshot-api-mcp
description: Give your AI agent eyes. MCP-native screenshot API for Claude, Cursor, and agent frameworks. One tool call returns a screenshot your agent can actually see.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture any public URL as a PNG or JPEG screenshot using a real Chromium browser (JS rendered, stealth mode, full-page support). Returns base64-encoded image data the agent can view directly.

tools.name: describe_page
tools.description: Take a screenshot of a URL and return it along with the page title, first H1, and meta description — all in one call. Saves an extra round-trip for the common 'what is on this page?' task.

url.description: Public URL to capture and describe

tools.name: capture_pdf
tools.description: Render any public URL as a print-ready A4 PDF using a real Chromium browser.

url.description: Public URL to render as PDF
